---
name: Propose a new foundation node
about: Propose adding a pattern, principle, antipattern, or decision-tree to foundations/
title: "[propose] <node title>"
labels: ["proposal", "foundation"]
---

<!--
Carta's foundation layer is intentionally narrow. Open this issue *before* drafting,
so we can confirm scope and avoid wasted effort. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the bar.
-->

## What kind of node

- [ ] Pattern (`foundations/20-patterns/...`)
- [ ] Principle (`foundations/15-principles/`)
- [ ] Antipattern (`foundations/50-antipatterns/`)
- [ ] Decision-tree (`foundations/25-decision-trees/`)
- [ ] Other:

## Proposed title

<!-- e.g. "Outbox pattern", "Bulkhead pattern" -->

## What problem it addresses

<!-- One paragraph: when is this node useful, what does it help a reader decide or build? -->

## Why it belongs at foundation level

<!--
Foundation nodes are framework- and library-agnostic, useful across orgs.
If this is specific to one stack or one team's vocabulary, it belongs at organisation level
in your fork — not upstream. Please justify why this clears the bar.
-->

## Proposed sources

<!--
At least one canonical source: book, peer-reviewed paper with DOI, or article by a
recognised authority on the topic. List title, author, year, link/DOI.
-->

1.

Where in the graph does this sit? What does it cross-reference?

- Patterns it competes with or composes with:
- Decision-trees that should now branch to it:
